---
name: Data Correction
about: Report incorrect Mass times, parish info, or other data
title: "[Data] "
labels: data
assignees: ''
---

## Parish / Church Name

Which parish or church has incorrect information?

## What's Wrong

What data is incorrect? (e.g., wrong Mass time, outdated confession schedule, wrong address, missing service)

## Correct Information

What should it say instead? Please be as specific as possible — day, time, language, seasonal notes, etc.

## Source

How do you know this is correct? (e.g., parish bulletin, parish website, you attend there, spoke with the parish office)

A link to the bulletin or website is very helpful if you have one.
